title: Justicia santapaui
intro: Justicia santapaui, also known as Santapaui's Justicia, is a medicinal plant belonging to the family Acanthaceae, traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine. The plant is valued for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, sore throat, and respiratory issues. Bioactive constituents present in the plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its therapeutic effects. Justicia santapaui is commonly used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being incorporated into traditional Ayurvedic formulations, such as powders and ointments.
